title: Universal Music stock rises 13% after Pershing Square's $64 billion takeover proposal
summary_full: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square said Universal Music's stock price has "languished" due to a range of issues that can be addressed with the merger.
summary_public: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square said Universal Music's stock price has "languished" due to a range of issues that can be addressed with the merger.
